title: The Relationship Between Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating how Deep Learning serves as a core function approximator within a broader Reinforcement Learning framework, as presented by Nikhil Buduma.
relationships: Agent uses Deep Neural Network to choose Action (A_t) based on State (S_t)
Environment returns Reward (R_t) and Next State (S_t+1) to Agent
Reward (R_t) is used to update the Deep Neural Network's parameters via an optimization algorithm (e.g., Gradient Descent)
